text:
is a fictional character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 

Profile

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA

Volume 1

In Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA, after the attack on the NERV Headquarters by the Mass Production Evangelions and their subsequent destruction, she was inside the Chronostatic Sphere and therefore was considered MIA (Missing In Action). Her glasses and position were both inherited by Maya Ibuki.
